overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a slow walk through a desert wasteland area featuring an abandoned amusement park with a prominent red roller coaster. The player moves along a mixed dirt and concrete path toward a wooden stilt shack, with a commercial building displaying a colorful neon sign visible on the right side.

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along a desert path beside a commercial building, exploring the abandoned amusement park area with the roller coaster visible ahead

entered.detail: red metal roller coaster tracks towering above the palm trees in the background
elevated wooden house on stilts with a dark roof, situated in the middle distance
scattered palm trees with dry fronds lining the path and background
single-story building with a balcony and metal siding running along the right side of the path
blue fabric awning or tarp leaning against the building wall
metal trash barrels or drums placed near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert wasteland scene with a prominent red roller coaster structure visible in the distance on the left. The camera moves forward along a dirt path toward a wooden stilt house in the center, while a commercial building with a blue awning lines the right side. The area is completely deserted with sparse palm trees scattered throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial building exterior along wasteland path

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward while shifting slightly toward the right to approach the commercial building with the neon signage

entered.detail: colorful illuminated neon sign with 'WESTERN' text in red and blue on the building facade

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances closer to the commercial building, the neon 'WESTERN' sign becomes clearly visible on the right. The wooden stilt shack appears larger and closer in the center view, while the blue awning and metal barrels from the previous segment pass out of view behind the camera. The roller coaster structure remains visible in the distant left background as the ground surface transitions to concrete sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a desolate desert wasteland that gradually closes in on a cluster of abandoned roadside structures. It begins on a wide expanse of dirt and sparse palm trees, with a prominent red roller coaster looming in the distant left background. As the camera advances toward a wooden stilt house in the center, the terrain shifts from a dusty path to a concrete sidewalk. The scene then tightens as the camera passes a blue awning and metal barrels, bringing a glowing neon Western sign on a commercial building into clear view on the right. Finally, the perspective settles closer to the stilt shack while the distant roller coaster remains a silent landmark on the horizon.
